title: People who stay mentally sharp well into their 80s don't do crossword puzzles or brain games — they all quit doing these 6 things that most people never realize are slowly eroding their cognitive flexibility - Silicon Canals
description: People who stay mentally sharp well into their 80s don't do crossword puzzles or brain games — they all quit doing these 6 things that most people never realize are slowly eroding their cognitive flexibility  Silicon CanalsPsychology says people who stay mentally sharp past 70 don't do it through brain games — they do it through a single daily practice that most people abandon the moment they retire  VegOutI'm 70 and my mind is sharper now than it was at 45 — not because I do crosswords or take supplements, but because I stopped consuming information passively and started treating every conversation like a problem I needed to solve  VegOutMost people who stay intellectually alive past 70 don't follow the advice they're given about brain health — when psychologists studied them, these 7 counterintuitive habits kept showing up, and not one of them involved puzzles or memory games  VegOutPsychology says people who stay mentally sharp past 70 almost always maintained one specific habit that has nothing to do with education — they kept having conversations with people who disagreed with them, and that friction kept their reasoning muscles  VegOut
